title: 1.20 panorama with shaders (night)
description: Add shaders to Minecraft panorama and change Minecraft panorama to night
body:
This pack changes the Minecraft 1.20 panorama to be more beautiful but becomes night instead of day



![This](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3a1596a13d085851342b600290ca9e94605ba06_0.webp)
